newsSince: Since June 9, Innolight hit an all-time high (CNY 1,368.50 on Jun 18) and a ProShares 2x-leveraged single-stock ETF (Ultra Innolight) was filed in the US, while Goldman reiterated bullish optical-interconnect TAM ($15B to ~$154B by 2027/28). These are mostly recognition/flow events; the genuine fundamental anchor (Q1 rev +192%, CPO/silicon-photonics mass-production lead, ~6-month edge) was already known.

sources.label: Goldman raises Innolight target / optical TAM 9x

verdicts.rankRationale: On the CPO lens Innolight has genuine choke-point leadership (silicon photonics now >half of 800G/1.6T, first CPO mass line). But this page penalizes discovered/crowded names; +110% YTD, ATH and a 2x ETF launch confirm it is widely owned, not hidden. Real CPO progress earns a small +, rank holds low.
verdicts.bull: Clearest CPO/silicon-photonics mass-production leader; optical-interconnect TAM expanding ~9x; Q1 profit topped all of 2024.
verdicts.neutral: Bottleneck thesis intact and strengthening, but recognition (Goldman, ETF, ATH) is catching up fast.
verdicts.bear: +110% YTD, leveraged ETF and retail crowding signal a discovered, momentum-driven name with valuation/cycle risk.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: 1.6T/CPO ramp and AI optical TAM expansion
